story.artifact_power: Hidden power beneath the reef that fuels the crab army.
story.greeting: Pirate, your island mission begins now — listen closely.
story.act1: On Blue Crab Island, swarms of snapping blue crabs guard the shores while a four-armed monkey rules from the tide pools, striking with impossible speed. Twisted by the will of Doctor Krit, it commands the crabs like an army. Hidden beneath the reef lies the Tidal Core that fuels its power. Pirate, we must reach it first and break Krit's control before the island is overrun.
story.act2: The four-armed monkey tightens its grip on the shore. Every tide pool Pirate crosses pulses with corrupted energy — but the path to the Tidal Core is becoming clear.
story.act3: The Tidal Core is within reach. One final push and Doctor Krit's hold over this crab-ruled island will be broken forever.
story.goal: Pirate, master every math trial, reach the island's core in time, and break Doctor Krit's hold.

stages.title: Pirate starts revision training
stages.mechanic_reason: Five tasks per round builds fluency with core multiplication and division facts.
stages.success_message: Well done, Pirate! The shore is yours!

stages.title: Pirate visits the market
stages.mechanic_reason: Word problems build conceptual understanding of multiplication and division.
stages.success_message: Brilliant, Pirate! You cracked the code!

rounds.title: Pirate visits the market
rounds.prompt: There are 3 baskets. Each basket has 4 apples. How many apples are there altogether?

rounds.title: Pirate shares cookies
rounds.prompt: 15 cookies are shared equally between 3 children. How many cookies does each child get?

rounds.title: Pirate finds toy cars
rounds.prompt: There are 5 toy cars. Each car carries 2 passengers. How many passengers are there in total?

rounds.title: Pirate helps at the bakery
rounds.prompt: 18 cupcakes are shared equally onto 3 trays. How many cupcakes go on each tray?

rounds.title: Pirate counts pencils
rounds.prompt: There are 4 boxes. Each box has 5 pencils. How many pencils are there altogether?

stages.title: Pirate checks the facts
stages.mechanic_reason: True/false checks understanding of multiplication and division facts.

stages.title: Pirate fills the missing number
stages.mechanic_reason: Fill-in-the-blank reinforces finding unknown values in multiplication and division.

stages.title: Pirate chooses the correct path
stages.mechanic_reason: Corridor choice tests understanding of which operation to apply.
stages.success_message: Correct path, Pirate! The Tidal Core is in sight!

rounds.title: Pirate chooses the correct path
rounds.question: 4 boxes with 3 apples each. Which path shows the total?

rounds.title: Pirate follows the map
rounds.question: 15 cookies shared between 3 children. Which path shows how many each child gets?

rounds.title: Pirate crosses the bridge
rounds.question: 5 cars with 2 passengers each. Which path shows the total?

rounds.title: Pirate reaches the cave
rounds.question: 18 cupcakes shared onto 3 trays. Which path shows cupcakes per tray?

rounds.title: Pirate reaches the treasure
rounds.question: 4 boxes with 5 pencils each. Which path shows the total?

stages.title: Pirate reaches the Tidal Core
stages.mechanic_reason: The boss stage mixes all mechanics for a final multi-skill challenge.
stages.success_message: Pirate, you've shut down the Tidal Core and freed the island!

rounds.title: Pirate Attacks the Boss
rounds.prompt: 4 baskets hold 5 apples each. How many apples are there altogether?

rounds.title: The Boss Loses Power
rounds.prompt: 18 cookies are shared equally between 3 children. How many cookies does each child get?

rounds.title: Pirate Dodges the Attack
rounds.question: 3 groups of 4. Which path shows the total?

rounds.title: Final Strike
rounds.question: 20 cookies shared between 5 children. Which path shows how many each child gets?
